subcodes.first_line: O Lord, O my Lord! The darkness hath indeed grown intense, and the pavilions covering the heads of men have been laid waste, and a veil hath obscured their sight [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: رب رب قد اشتد الظلام و خرب الخیام علی روس الانام و حجبت الابصار غشاوه
subcodes.subjects: @empty learning; false spirituality, @prayer for the spiritual progress of others, @literal interpretation
